name: __overview__
description: This page provides a curated list of functions and properties available in the malariagen_data API for data on mosquitoes from the Anopheles gambiae complex. To set up the API, use the following code: All the functions below can then be accessed as methods on the ag3 object. E.g., to call the sample_metadata() function, do: For more information about the data and terms of use, please see the MalariaGEN Anopheles gambiae genomic surveillance project home page.
example:
import malariagen_data ag3 = malariagen_data.Ag3()
df_samples = ag3.sample_metadata()
